clean_text: top quality dd on eth high conviction trade since my last dd on meta hand written not ai alright regard if you had been following my last dd on meta you wouldve done really well since that dd post my position ha been up moderately ive been getting really good yield on the covered call written against my longer dated call i bought back when im up and sell another call when the stock rally with climbing implied volatility i will still follow my original trade plan in my previous dd post for exit and take profit tldr fundamentally gold and silver are mainly driven by money supply aka inflation btc and eth are sharing this trend since they were gradually adopted by institution and mainstream around to present i am arguing that btc and eth are acting more and more like commodity since then macropolicy the current administration is keeping inflation higher for longer bullish for commodity thesis commodity will move higher with inflation and btc and eth in particular will experience a catch up trade a the current cycle isnt over yet shortmedium term catalyst for eth is the tokenization of stock security and long term catalyst for eth is stablecoin market cap will x by according to scott bessent dd start here im here today to make you all a bit more money for christmas etherium some people call it digital silver some people call it the backbone of wall street some people call it a scam i think quite a few of these people have lost money on it tom lee ha called it the macro trade of the decade and more people are calling tom lee a con artist lately while others are still amazed at his haircut all the noise make it hard to focus on the main issue is etherium worth anything or is it just fairy dust in my dd i want to focus on the first principle of thing so you wont be reading an ai slop or some useless rambling of hopium what is value the traditional value investing way of computing the intrinsic value of an asset is by looking at all the future cash flow this asset can yield which is why we can value a stock because owning the stock is partially owning the future cash flow the company generates by this metric goldsilverbtceth are all the same they have no intrinsic value a they dont earn you any money just by holding them which lead u to the next question why are gold and silver doing so well while btc and eth are trading like hot garbage what is price how are commodity priced there are many factor that influence the price of a commodity the most common factor include utility scarcity trustcredibility cost to carry supply and demand and most importantly market sentiment mass psychology for gold and silver specifically they have limited in supply on earth and have been around for a long time where people have trust in them not only a commodity but also a currency in term of utility silver ha various industrial utility due to it superior conductivity and gold ha a stable demand in many industry shown in the graph below however if you just look at supply v demand you would realized they are not off by much and it not really the driver for gold price same for silver what is the real driver for price a mentioned earlier gold and silver have been around long enough for people to trust them not just a commodity but a currency so much so that they are considered riskoff asset or save haven when shit hit the fan central bank build reserve with gold to maintain their monetary system credibility in and preserve national wealth against various economic risk in other word gold and silver are strongly linked to fiat currency and we can use money supply a a proxy for gold and silver a shown in chart below like the stock market gold and silver price go up with the increasing money supply aka inflation on top of that gold and silver ha demonstrated to be the safe haven when a crisis happens both gold and silver had a massive rally in during the global financial crisis a everyone thought the u financial system wa going to collapse and piled their money into gold and silver for safety what about btc and eth there are certainly similarity for btc and eth when compared to gold and silver for example btc also ha a fixed total supply and is the world first ever decentralized payment network based on the blockchain similar to gold it became a much more volatile version of store of value and eth took blockchain a step further and became a global computing network that allowed programmer to build decentralized application used to tokenize any asset sound like silver when it come to ulitity the photo below illustrates the market value of tokenized asset and transaction on the eth network in while eth only share a tiny portion of the tam in these transaction eth is definitely a leader in term of the tokenization of asset so far of stablecoin run via eth and according to scott bessant the market cap of stablecoin will grow ten fold into so it definitely sound like a ton of upside for this network while it sounded like a greenflag on paper i consider the eth supply to be a red flag eth bull like to say eth ha a burning mechanism on a portion of the transactional fee that creates a deflationary effect on eth a projection chart show below the total supply of eth is projected to decline in the coming year eth give a dividend i find this to be shady and dont really buy it on top of that i think the switching cost is too high given eth network ha a pretty expensive transactional fee aka gas price but if the supply projection hold true eth will be much closer to the digital silver regardless of how many gold and silver trait btc and eth embodies the correlation between btceth and m say it all both commodity are starting to show correlation with money supply and the stock market since and the reason why i picked this time frame is because so why doe it feel like btc and eth are trading with the stock market like a risk on asset this explanation is based on an interview by steve eisman with rahul jindal a fintech strategist at autonomous jindal explains that btc and eth began trading more like stock after because the type of investor holding crypto changed in the early year crypto wa mostly owned by early adopter who viewed it a a hedge against bank and fiat money so it wa less correlated with equity after covid easier access through exchange large retail participation and excess liquidity caused crypto to be held alongside stock in investor portfolio a a result btc and eth became sensitive to money supply and risk appetite which explains why they have moved closely with the stock market since rather than behaving like gold this doe not mean btc and eth will always trade like highbeta stock a adoption matures and ownership shift further toward institution and longterm holder their price are more likely to be driven by supply constraint network usage and monetary demand rather than shortterm liquidity cycle over time this would allow btc and eth to behave more like commodity where value is tied to money supply instead of purely reacting to stock market sentiment the inflationary policy macro effect trump ha taken extensive measure manipulating the bls job data and putting pressure on the fed to keep the usd weak and interest rate low to maintain export advantage service the trillion debt despite high level of inflation the promotion of stablecoin also introduces more inflation a people around the globe can now purchase usd backed by treasury kinda like the u can issue debt to the entire world the end of the quantitative tightening is another catalyst to at least support more liquidity coming into the equity and capital market which could be inflationary short term catalyst for eth tokenization in the tokenization of stock reach several milestone including sec roundtable on tokenization platform like ondo launch tokenized stock outside the u blackrock explores tokenized etf industry leader predict massive market growth nasdaq file to list tokenized stock by knowpia enables tokenization ahead of wall street and could see further acceleration to this adoption cnbc report stock tokenziation running on the eth network to visualize the true upside of stock tokenization the economist and deutch bank offered some great insight on tokenization below so far of tokenized asset are stable coin which eth dominates and the tokenization of stock could really invite traffic to the eth network so why have btc and eth traded like hot garbage into year end since late october the stock market ha been choppy rather than trending volatility stayed elevated and trend signal weakened which caused systematic investor like ctas and voltargeting fund to reduce exposure in this environment btc and eth sold off during equity drawdowns but failed to rally on rebound not because of panic but because risk appetite never fully returned positioning stayed light and investor remained cautious so this look more like a pause than a breakdown the stock market ha stabilized and pushed to new high into yearend which suggests sentiment is still intact most notably the ai sector ha remained strong earnings from nvidia and broadcom were outstanding showing that growth expectation have not collapsed a equity volatility compress and riskon sentiment improves this give the market room to grind higher if that happens liquidity and positioning should rotate back into highbeta asset which is bullish for btc and eth heading into early looking at the eth chart the day candle is showing stabilization and i dont see why it wouldnt revisit ath and break above in q my expression for this bet bmnr i bought deep itm bmnu call so my breakeven is at the time of purchase a i think eth could revisit k in q bmnr is the perfect pick i pick it for reason no debt so it much less of a fraud such a mstr which is also starting to price in not being included into sp premium to nav expansion if my thesis play out tom lee will look like a genius again premium to nav can revisit higher level x x which is why i picked bmnr over sbet because people give leader a premium in the treasury holding company world i think we are close to a reversal given crypto already being in a bear market with greed and fear recently being in extreme fear for reason i mentioned earlier the eth network is doing great far from a bear market so the price being in a bear market zone is really just a gift position i even bought for my tfsa

thats generational trauma and yet here the weird part consecutive quarterly growth latest earnings earnings q fy revenue arr to b earnings q fy revenue arr to b gaap loss last year m gaap profit now m this utterly massive and a real turn around backed by number sp midcap inclusion from st jan profitable growing still alive stock reaction meh stuck in the gulag with a small pump to while analyst shrug and say moderate buy and hold market is basically saying cool story show me more profitable quarter and we are getting there what doe path even do they invented rpa robotic process automation software bot that do boring corporate crap like copy pdfs click button in sap move data between garbage enterprise system they own this market market share gartner leader year straight everyone else is mile behind problem oldschool rpa is dumb automation rulesbased no thinking then ai showed up and scared everyone the pivot agentic automation this is the bull case maestro is uipaths control layerai can decide what to do uipath bot can do it maestro make sure it doesnt break production it orchestrates ai agent robot and human in one workflow with approval retries and audit log this is the boring enterprise stuff company actually care about everyone can build ai demo very few can run ai safely at scale if uipath win maestro is why idea is simple ai agent brain uipath bot hand human babysitter ai decides what to do uipath robot actually log into oracle sap whatever dinosaur system and do it this is the last mile problem of ai chatgpt can think it cannot click approve invoice inside a yearold erp system uipath can theyre not trying to beat openai theyre trying to make ai useful inside real company if that work huge if not microsoft eats their lunch the bear case microsoft power automate it bundled it cheap it already everywhere microsoft will dominate simple automation small team good enough use case uipath ha to prove it worth paying extra for missioncritical enterprisescale automation thats the entire fight financials aka why this isnt dead yet arr b net retention and growing not declining customer spend more over time cash b debt basically none they stopped the burn money vibe only strategy and got disciplined valuation p thats dirt cheap if the turnaround work my take this is not a hype ai play this is a turnaround bet at share the market is pricing in stagnation eventual irrelevance microsoft dominance i dont buy the terminal decline story founder is back balance sheet is stacked they dont need miracle just execution if they fail stock probably chop sideways if the ai automation combo hit this rerates hard riskreward is asymmetric im willing to bet position k c jan tldr path went from a brutal ipo bag to straight quarter of growth and real profitability m gaap b arr retention b cash turnaround bet on ai automation maestro still priced for failure asymmetric upside v microsoft risk

dca list ive read the loss and gain porn and decided im just going to let the dca guide me here is my current plan with stock for growth and stock for dividend im already invested in some of these but only really been going on the market since sept of this year so it peanut anything not on this list here are my rule stock or leap only any option less than month can suck my dick only actual business because i cant catch knife anymore trailing stop loss on everything not in the above list preferably at and at of share respectfully selling callsputs is fine but only sell put near d ma or lower ill have a third account to do my buffoonery like shorter term option but ive spent so much time to either break even or lose of my port to feel comfortable with anymore than that currently going to put daily into each of these list and while i have a good amount of cash set aside for this my plan is to sell half of my non divi stock whenever a stock go up ie half at next half at etc so i know this is boring but anything else i should worry about here or any major sector im missing my main focus in is pretty heavy around space ai and metal with the dividend covering additional stuff like retail healthcare etc some not listed that im already invested in are sofi nflx pct smr

how good actually wa the wsb outperformance statistical analysis obviously a lot of traction of the outperformance of the wsb pick i wanted to do a slightly more thorough analysis to see if there wa any real alpha here tldr evidence of excess return but the performance is best explained by a highly aggressive factorloaded portfolio in a strong market environment to evaluate alpha i used standard assetpricing model including capm and the famafrench fourfactor model market size value and momentum these model help distinguish return driven by skill from return driven by exposure to known risk factor such a growth momentum or smallcap bias the portfolio wa an equal weighted basket of the pick amd goog hood meta mstr pltr rddt rklb tsla wmt note this analysis is through nov since famafrench hasnt published daily return for december descriptive stats portfolio return spy return portfolio outperformance portfolio vol spy vol portfolio sharpe sortino spy sharpe sortino interpretation significant outperformance with significantly more volatility capm regression adj rsquared market beta interpretation the portfolio had an extremely high beta ie if the market go up all else equal you expect the portfolio to go up x the market if it go down same thing in reverse famafrench four factor regression mktrf very high market risk smb small cap weighted hml strong growth bias mom significant momentum exposure interpretation confirms that the portfolio wa significantly weighted towards levered growth name conclusion nothing novel here wsb tilt towards higher risk momentum name if the same exercise is done in you should expect outperformance if the market go up and underperformance if the market go down sourcesmethods famafrench library yfinance python happy to answer any question or provide code if people are interested in running it themselves

is avgo a trap or a straight up opportunity right now ive been reading citis semiconductor outlook they expect broadcoms revenue from google to double in versus and potentially nearly double again in broadcom also appears to have secured meaningful order from aws and microsoft with strong revenue growth expected by citi forecast that xpus will grow faster than gpus by driven by a smaller base and the acceleration of custom ai chip program some people with a zerosum mindset might argue this is negative for nvda or even amd but those closer to the industry know that nvidia will continue selling every chip system and rack it can produce avgo and mrvl have also been performing very well not only in custom asics but also across networking and storage curious how everyone is positioning in avgo right now

coupang cpng is big fuk disclaimer this wa prepared with the help of a korean associate later we fed it in to ai for translation and formatting purpose tldr cpng only trade in the u but the crisis is entirely in korea lawmaker are talking perjury and suspension the public is actively boycotting and this is a newly profitable logisticsheavy business that cannot survive disruption u investor are pricing a pr issue korea is treating this a a companyending legitimacy failure coupang is fuk this need to be viewed a a korean political and legitimacy crisis not a u tech stock hiccup and korean senator explicitly said that today at the national assembly hearing lawmaker directly addressed the gap between how this crisis is reported in korea versus how it framed in u outlet domestically investigator are disputing coupangs disclosure challenging sworn testimony and raising perjury accusation internationally it still framed a a data breach plus compensation senator openly questioned why foreign investor are seeing a materially softer narrative and several explicitly warned that this information gap itself is becoming part of the problem that matter even more because coupang only trade in the u the korean platform is owned by a delaware holding company listed on the nyse there is no korean stock price to reflect domestic outrage no local shareholder pressure and no market release valve all price discovery happens in the u while all political regulatory and consumer pressure is happening inside korea lawmaker are clearly aware of this and unhappy about it on the ground public reaction is not abstract lawmaker civic group and labor organization are openly calling for operational suspension not just fine or apology korean medium coverage ha shifted from breach response to whether the company should be allowed to continue operating in it current form at the consumer level largescale boycott behavior is observable with appusage tracker and business press reporting decline in daily active user while competitor gained share in korea boycott are not symbolic people actually leave platform especially when alternative exist this is existential for coupang because of it structure the company only recently became profitable after year of loss it is a logisticsheavy business with thin margin that depends on uninterrupted volume dense routing and habitdriven repeat usage a sustained boycott or even a temporary suspension would immediately reverse profitability driver leave seller leave customer retrain behavior this is not a business you can pause and restart two week ago coupang installed a ustrained american lawyer a ceo to front the crisis domestically that ha been widely interpreted a insulating decisionmakers behind u legal optic rather than accepting korean accountability that perception ha worsened public anger and reinforced the political narrative that the company is evading responsibility rather than confronting it this is why this trade is no longer about valuation multiple or growth trajectory it about whether a newly profitable logisticsdependent company openly boycotted politically isolated under criminal scrutiny and facing call for suspension can survive in a country that actually follows through on public and state pressure even if it wa about fundamental they are shit anyways u market are pricing a bad news cycle korea is treating this a a companyending legitimacy failure that disconnect is the thesis position about k in may put

a boring value bet k in sbet sharplink gaming inc discoutn on nav since i am already invested in ethereum with grayscale ethereum mini trust etf eth i swapped some of that into sbet to me this is a bet on mean reversion doe not add any ethereum beta for me the opportunity the stock is trading at around discount against it nav im not using the enterprise value because the company literally just hold and stake ethereum this mean there is a potential upside to ethereum the staking also yield about per year which make time in our favor personally i think the discount is unjustified and are overreaction of the recent market crash of ethereum from it peak in oct to now at what do sbet do sbet is basically an eth treasury company in plain word it a kind of company that harvest the premium mnav by doing atm sale to buy more eth and increase the eth per share or do buy back when there a discount on mnav both are accretive just like other crypto treasury company like mstr bmnr btbt etc they all use a mixed of pipe atm convertible to raise fund and keep accumulating crypto the risk the risk is obvious if they do atm sale when the stock is at discount to nav it will be dilutive which mean eth per share go down nav go down and the discount can continue to widen just like this ethz use atm selling to raise fund to pay their convertible and betray their investor by claiming they will no longer focus on building eth per share but to pivot to something else the discount gap may widen further or stay unclosed for a long time it also inherit all the market risk from ethereum itself obviously the good part the company ha no convertible no long term or current debt a per their latest q and they also made a post on twitter stating they ha never done atm sale when nav is at a discount while it not legally binding it an important and serious statement violating that kind of statement would be faced with lawsuit from angry shareholder burn their reputation and limit their future ability to raise money i placed a k bet on this but let be honest the potential upside from this bet probably wont be exciting enough for most people in wsb it not even a potential lol however if youre also betting on ethereum than this is a different story now if you doesnt want to bet on ethereum you can probably use future to cancel out the ethereum beta the staking yield should cover the fee for you
